pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will target Java 11 bytecode instead of Java 21, failing to utilize new language features or meeting project requirements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not support the --release flag for Java 21 or may fail to compile Java 21 source code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin release configuration to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will target Java 11 bytecode instead of Java 21, failing to utilize new language features or meeting project requirements.
